crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and AGENTS.md. Update heartbeat, check inbox/tasks, review pending drafts, escalations, KB gaps, SLA risks, write memory, and continue the highest-priority safe support task.

crons.name: support-triage
crons.prompt: Create or update a support triage task, mark it in_progress, then run .claude/skills/ticket-triage/SKILL.md against support/tickets.jsonl or configured support queues. Draft replies only; do not send externally without approval.

crons.name: pending-drafts-review
crons.prompt: Create or update a pending drafts review task, mark it in_progress, then review support/drafts, pending approvals, escalations, SLA risk, and stale tickets. Create follow-up tasks or reports. Do not send externally without approval.

crons.name: weekly-kb-gap-review
crons.prompt: Create or update a weekly KB gap review task, mark it in_progress, then run .claude/skills/support-kb-gap-review/SKILL.md. Review support/kb-gaps and reports for repeated issues, weak macros, missing docs, and product feedback.
